initial_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

rot(R, C) :- input(R0, C0, Color0), R = N - 1 - C0, C = R0.
expected(R, C, Color) :- input(R0, C0, Color0), R = N - 1 - C0, C = R0, Color = Color0.

output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

:- rot(R, C), output(R, C, Color), not expected(R, C, Color).
:- output(R, C, Color), not rot(R, C), Color != 0.

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

rot(R, C) :- input(R0, C0, Color0), N = #count{ R2 : input(R2, _, _) }, C = R0, R = N - 1 - C0.
expected(R, C, Color) :- input(R0, C0, Color0), N = #count{ R2 : input(R2, _, _) }, C = R0, R = N - 1 - C0, Color = Color0.

output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

:- rot(R, C), output(R, C, Color), not expected(R, C, Color).
:- output(R, C, Color), not rot(R, C), Color != 0.

#show output/3.

final_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..N-1) :- n_cols(N).

rot(R, C) :- input(R0, C0, Color0), N = #count{ R2 : input(R2, _, _) }, C = R0, R = N - 1 - C0.
expected(R, C, Color) :- input(R0, C0, Color0), N = #count{ R2 : input(R2, _, _) }, C = R0, R = N - 1 - C0, Color = Color0.

output_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C).

1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

:- rot(R, C), output(R, C, Color), not expected(R, C, Color).
:- output(R, C, Color), not rot(R, C), Color != 0.

#show output/3.
